CONTENT.Club career: On 31 January 2020, Burgzorg was loaned to Heracles Almelo with an option to buy.On 29 January 2022, Burgzorg joined Mainz 05 on loan. On 17 May 2022, Mainz exercised their option to make the transfer permanent and Burgzorg signed a three-year contract with the club.On 17 August 2023, Burgzorg moved to English Championship club Huddersfield Town on a season-long loan.On 14 June 2024, Burgzorg signed for Championship club Middlesbrough for an undisclosed fee, signing a four-year deal.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in the Netherlands, Burgzorg is of Surinamese descent and could represent either country.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the 1. FSV Mainz 05 website (in German)

SUMMARY: Delano Burgzorg (born 7 November 1998) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a forward for EFL Championship club Middlesbrough.
